message:
fix(policy,compression,tx): rate limit off-by-one, silent compression failure, silenced ledger errors

Three bugs found during deep code review:

1. policy.rs prune_old: strict inequality (>) excluded timestamps at
   the window boundary, effectively shrinking the rate limit window by
   one operation. Changed to >= for correct boundary inclusion.

2. byte_compression.rs compress_with_level: compression errors were
   silently swallowed, returning uncompressed data that would then fail
   decompression. Added tracing::warn so failures are observable. Also
   added try_into guard for the u32 size prefix to catch >4GB inputs
   instead of silently truncating.

3. tx_execution.rs: three `let _ = ledger.append/transition_phase`
   calls silently discarded errors from the idempotency ledger. Added
   tracing::warn for each so ledger write failures are observable in
   logs rather than silently lost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
